name: PLS Check Cashers
description_short: Arlington's PLS Check Cashers at 5400 South Cooper Street operates 24/7 for quick check cashing and payment services.
description_long:
Located at 5400 South Cooper Street in Arlington, Texas, PLS Check Cashers is a standalone check-cashing facility open 24 hours every day of the week. This Arlington location provides convenient around-the-clock access for residents and workers in the area. Whether you need service on a weekend or late-night shift, this Arlington branch is ready to help whenever you need it.

At this South Cooper Street location in Arlington, PLS Check Cashers offers check cashing, bill payments, and related financial services with fast processing. The staff at this Arlington address handle transactions efficiently to get you in and out quickly. Contact the location directly at +1 817-522-7500 with questions about specific services.

If you're an Arlington resident needing quick check cashing without bank delays or fees, this South Cooper Street location is your local option. Bring a valid government-issued ID and your check to complete your transaction. PLS Check Cashers serves communities throughout TX with reliable check-cashing solutions.
pros: 24/7 operating hours across all service categories, providing access outside standard banking hours
Multi-state presence with 11 states served, offering geographic convenience and accessibility
Bundled services combining financial transactions (check cashing, bill pay) with administrative services (notary, vehicle registration) in single locations
Ria Money Transfer integration for domestic and international money transfers
Government benefits access services for Social Security and other benefit recipients
Prepaid debit card option (Xpectations! PLUS Debit Mastercard) with mobile app support
Foreign exchange services available for international transactions
cons: Check cashing and money order services typically charge transaction fees that traditional banks provide for free
Limited transparency on fee structure from website content alone
Recent privacy policy updates suggest expanded data collection practices requiring consumer review
Services target unbanked/underbanked populations who often have fewer financial resources
Vehicle registration and administrative services may not be available at all locations despite website listings
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers without access to traditional checking accounts
Shift workers and those needing financial services outside standard business hours
Individuals requiring bundled services (check cashing plus vehicle registration/notary) in one location
diagnosis: PLS Check Cashers is best for unbanked/underbanked consumers and shift workers who need financial services outside traditional banking hours, particularly those seeking bundled check cashing and administrative services in single locations. The primary caveat is that check cashing and ancillary services carry transaction fees that make PLS more expensive than traditional bank accounts for frequent users, despite offering genuine convenience for those unable or unwilling to maintain standard bank relationships.
services: City stickers and transit card sales
Prepaid debit card (Xpectations! PLUS Debit Mastercard)
meta_description: PLS Check Cashers at 5400 South Cooper, Arlington, TX. Open 24/7 for check cashing and bill payments.
